metadata.description: Stride task management skills for AI agents

plugins.name: stride
plugins.description: Task lifecycle skills for Stride kanban: claiming, completing, creating tasks and goals, enriching tasks, workflow orchestration, subagent dispatch, and automatic hook execution via Claude Code hooks

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: AI-powered security review of code changes via the /security-review slash command. Detects injection, authentication and authorization flaws, data exposure, cryptographic weaknesses, input validation gaps, race conditions, XSS/code execution, and insecure configuration — semantic analysis, not pattern matching. Loosely based on anthropics/claude-code-security-review.
